name: Lemon Sours
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix flour and butter to a fine crumb.
2. Sprinkle the mixture evenly in an 11x7-inch pan.
3. Bake for 10 minutes at 350°F (175°C).
4. Beat eggs and mix with brown sugar, shredded coconut, chopped nuts, baking powder, and vanilla.
5. Spread over the baked mixture when removed from the oven.
6. Return to the oven and bake for an additional 20 minutes.
7. Mix lemon rind and juice; add confectioners sugar to make a cream mixture.
8. Spread over the top of egg mixture when removed from the oven.
9. Cool and cut into squares.
